title: NTTSU at WMT2025 General Translation Task
abstract: This paper presents the submission of NTTSU for the constrained track of the English–Japanese and Japanese–Chinese at the WMT2025 general translation task.For each translation direction, we build translation models from a large language model by combining continual pretraining, supervised fine-tuning, and preference optimization based on the translation quality and adequacy.We finally generate translations via context-aware MBR decoding to maximize translation quality and document-level consistency.
relevance_note: Machine translation system submission; no speech synthesis.
